title: Big Mama Bicycle bell - Bike bell adult -bicycle bell adult bike - Cycle bell - Cycle bell for mountain bike - bike bell adult road bike - bike bells
features: CLEAR SOUND: These bike bells deliver a loud and crisp tone, ensuring optimal safety on the road – easily heard by pedestrians and other cyclists.
NO RATTLING: Thanks to high-quality craftsmanship, the bike bell for adults remains silent even on bumpy roads – no annoying rattling or jingling while riding.
EASY INSTALLATION: This bicycle bell can be effortlessly attached to handlebars with a diameter of 20–25 mm – a perfect fit for most bikes.
LARGE CYCLE BELL: With a diameter of approximately 7.5 cm and a height of 5 cm, this road bike bell offers both style and functionality for adult and kids' bikes.
SUITABLE FOR ALL BIKES: Ideal for city bikes, children's bikes, men's bicycles, and more. Available in multiple colours, including black, white, red, blue, silver, and turquoise.
